validation_rules.Passport: Must be valid for at least 6 months from entry date.
validation_rules.GAMCA Medical: Must show 'FIT' status from an approved GCC medical center.
validation_rules.Police Clearance: PCC must be recently issued (within 3 months) by national authority showing no active criminal record.
validation_rules.Letter of Acceptance: Must be from an approved GCC educational institution or employer sponsorship permit.

critical_rules: Verify Medical Fit status on the GAMCA certificate.
Verify PCC is valid and issued within the last 90 days.
Passport expiration date must cover visa duration.
ai_instructions: Confirm 'FIT' mark on GAMCA report and verify PCC issuance date.
pass_examples: GAMCA shows FIT, PCC issued 10 days ago, Passport valid for 1 year.
fail_examples: GAMCA report status is UNFIT, PCC is 6 months old.
